entry.title: New: Bill 83 (Hawaiʻi County) — On agenda 2025-12-03
entry.content:
AMENDS CHAPTER 20 OF THE HAWAI‘I COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), RELATING TO PLASTIC AND POLYSTYRENE WASTE

Seeks to reduce disposable plastic or polystyrene foodware and serviceware in alignment with the County of Hawai‘i’s Zero Waste Plan and the State of Hawai‘i’s Aloha+ Challenge Solid Waste Reduction Goals.

Latest action: On agenda 2025-12-03

View on the council site
